session.user: Run ruff format on these two files and report results: 1. ruff format src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py 2. ruff format tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py
session.assistant: I'll run ruff format on both files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff format on two files

session.assistant:
ruff format passed: 2 files reformatted successfully
Both files have been formatted: 1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py`
